title: About Jack
text: Hello! I’m Jack! Welcome to my blog with some interesting facts and trends inside of the sports world! Here is where I will be posting different trends inside the sports world especially inside of NCAA Men’s Basketball!

title: March Madness seeding is NOT a measure of success
text:

How the NCAA seeds the Men’s March Madness Tournament is NOT a measure of how far team will go in the postseason tournament.
